title: Grounded
description: Breaking new ground with new soil types that look, act, and grow crops differently.
body:
![Banner of full Grounded logo](https://i.imgur.com/f403Iyb.png)
*Breaking new ground with new types of soil.*

# What's Grounded?
Grounded gives biomes massively more distinct identities, down to the very soil they stand on. Badlands now sport cracked, dry earthen clay. Tundra dirt has frozen into deep permafrost. *REST OF THE SOILS* These soils aren't just pretty either--each incentivises growing certain crops faster on them, based on those crops' real life growing preferences.


### REQUIRES MOONLIGHT!

![Vine divider stating "COMPAT"](https://i.imgur.com/WyNpy6N.png)

Grounded has built-in compat for:
 - Farmer's Delight
 - *Biomes O' Plenty*
 - *No Man's Land*
 - *Terralith*

![vine divider by The Bobbu stating "features"](https://i.imgur.com/YnRxEo4.png)

Grounded primarily adds 5* new soil types that generate in the world.
 - **Earthen Clay** is found in savannas and badlands.
	 - **Wheat** and **Bamboo** grow faster in Earthen Clay Farmland.


 - **Loam** is found in dark forests and jungles.
	 - **Sweet Berry Bushes**, **Pumpkins** and **Melons** grow faster in Loam Farmland.


 - **Permafrost** is found in snowy mountains and frozen taigas.
	 - There is no permafrost farmland, and the block does not affect crops. However, digging Permafrost with fortune might reveal long-frozen treasures...


 - **Sandy Dirt** is found in savannas.
	 - **Carrots**, **Beetroots**, and Farmer's Delight **Cabbages** grow faster in Sandy Farmland.


 - **Silt** is found in riverbeds, swamps, and aquifers.
	 - **Wheat**, **Potatoes**, Farmer's Delight **Cabbages** and **Onions**, as well as Supplementaries **Flax** grow faster in Silty Farmland.


Each soil has their own paths, farmlands, and grassy and coarse versions.

Mulch and Nulch are decorative blocks that cover the base of the stem of plants placed on them, as if in a heaped flowerbed.

Villages now have paths made from the appropriate soils for their biomes, as well as having their respective farmlands growing their ideal crops.

![Vine divider stating "CREDITS"](https://i.imgur.com/gpC2puj.png)
- [Kayla the Bee](https://modrinth.com/user/Kayla_the_Bee) for the mod's textures.

![Vine divider by the Bobbu](https://i.imgur.com/g3DorAO.png)
Please include in modpacks! if you do you can talk about it on our *discord*.
#### Grounded is best paired with:
[**![Would](https://i.imgur.com/YdPkWIv.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/would "Would") [**![Verdant](https://i.imgur.com/GiUOrEz.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdant-mod "Verdant") [**![Oxide](https://i.imgur.com/dFua2iK.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdant-mod "Oxide")
